text.title: QA Suite Health Metrics Canon Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the rubric artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-qa-suite-health-metrics-canon.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

section.title: Schema

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: metrics count != 6; direction not in enum; cadence_days != 7; missing owner/route_to_methodology.
